name: Guti
overview: Sultana, A drug carrier and a mother, is associated with a local drug trafficking network for the last few years. During this period, Sultana has earned a lot of money and wealth but in return she has lost her relationships, faith and hope. There is no way to escape, yet escape is the only way for Sultana.

trailers.title: GUTI | Official Trailer | Chorki Original Series | Badhan | Nasir | Mousumi | Joy | Shankha
